name: 7P HEX IP
comment: The webpage claims "6, 6+, 9, 9+, 10, & 12-channel" modes, but this seems to be completely false.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast

gwSpecs.description: The ADJ 7P HEX IP is a versatile, heavy duty Par with HEX LEDs, a 30-degree beam angle, and all metal construction. It is IP65 outdoor rated to protect against, rain, snow and dust for temporary outdoor events.
